Template for reporting bugs in Flask, including sections for replication steps and environment details.

# Purpose
This metadata file defines a template for reporting bugs in the Flask project. It provides a structured format for users to submit bug reports, ensuring that all necessary information is included. The template includes sections for describing the bug, steps to replicate it, and the expected behavior. It also prompts users to provide their Python and Flask versions to help developers diagnose the issue. The file guides users to replace placeholder comments with specific details about the bug, ensuring clarity and completeness in the report.
